headline: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target on PNC Financial (PNC)
summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued American Stocks to Invest In. On June 29, 2026, Morgan Stanley analyst Manan Gosalia raised the firm’s price target on The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) to $278 from $267 and kept an Equal Weight rating.
